title: fix(nunchaku): install from prebuilt wheel + recovery doc fixes
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Wheels up for Nunchaku
gist.blurb: We've swapped out our lengthy source builds for prebuilt wheels, cutting Nunchaku setup time from 15 minutes to just 30 seconds. Faster pod recoveries mean less downtime for the hive!
gist.summary: Switched Nunchaku installation to use a prebuilt wheel and pinned PyTorch versions to improve RunPod deployment speed and reliability.
gist.impact: Pod recovery and worker boot times are significantly faster, reducing potential downtime during infrastructure resets.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot and the monitor-head robot working together to quickly attach a literal wheel to a server rack, symbolizing the switch to prebuilt Python wheels for faster deployment.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot quickly attaching a glowing lime green (#ecf874) wheel to a retro server rack. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot quickly attaching a glowing lime green (#ecf874) wheel to a retro server rack.
